name: Michelle Obama
subject: Hillary needs you to step up, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
It's crunch time | Derek --

Before the end of the month, people in states across America will start casting their ballots during early voting. We're in crunch time, and every hour and every dollar will count.

Hillary’s team needs the resources to get our message out there and earn every vote, which is why they’ve set a goal of 2.5 million donors before the end of the month. **[Will you help them hit this goal -- and get a free sticker, too?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY0OTg5NjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMTAwMTk5S0&mt=2&rj=ODgyMTAwMTk5S0&rt=0)**

We can’t just wish Hillary into office -- we have to fight for it. And your donation will help make that possible today, Derek.

**So I hope you’ll stand with Hillary and chip in before Thursday night and get a free sticker:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY0OTg5NjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMTAwMTk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Michelle

subject: Upfront
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
I'm asking for your help right now. | Dear Friend -- Let me be upfront. I'm asking you for $10 right now. | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTUxMTU1MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMTEyNTEyMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Here's why:
* There are less than two months left before the election. Time is running short. We have to do everything we can **right now.**
* The Republican Governors Association has pledged to do everything they can to tear our campaign down. The RGA has millions of dollars from supporters like the Koch brothers to dump into this race immediately.
* If the Republicans are following their primary playbook, they are getting ready to hit us with attack ad after attack ad in October.

**That 's why I'm asking for your immediate support. We can't take anything for granted. **
The progress we've worked so hard for is at stake. There's no place in Washington state for the retrograde values and policies promoted by my opponent and his fellow Republicans.
I've set an ambitious goal for our campaign: $15,000 before our mid-month deadline this Friday.
[**Will you help us get there?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=OTUxMTU1MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMTEyNTEyMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Jay Inslee

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: I’m writing to ask you a favor, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
A favor | Derek, I cannot thank you enough for the outpouring of support that Hillary got from this team. So many of you have written in with your best wishes for her, and it means so much to her to know she has you in her corner.

That’s why I’m writing today to ask for a favor: **[Will you chip in right now to say loudly and proudly that you stand with Hillary -- and get a free sticker while you’re at it?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY0OTkzODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMTI4NjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)** A donation today isn’t just about money -- it’s about showing her you’re on her side when she needs you the most.

Hillary will get back on the trail as soon as she can, but in the mean time, she needs all of us to do our part.

**We’ve got huge moments coming up -- the first debate is in less than two weeks -- and right now, all you need to do is say that you’re ready to stand and fight by Hillary’s side:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY0OTkzODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMTI4NjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you, Derek. It’s an honor to be on this team with you.

Huma

Huma Abedin
Vice Chair
Hillary for America

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37548139:WerTvIbNs:m:1:876315805:CAF7B5230CED9CAA28F8DF36C0AC60D6:r)

Peter,

I'm asking you to stick up for the tens of millions of Americans Hillary slandered as "deplorable" and un-American.

But we only have 24 hours to raise $1,OOO,OOO to launch an ad blitz firing back at Hillary Clinton's disgusting remarks.

[**Please contribute $100, $65, $35, $25, or even $15 to help us push our ad far and wide.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37548139:WerTvIbNs:m:1:876315805:CAF7B5230CED9CAA28F8DF36C0AC60D6:r)

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37548139:WerTvIbNs:m:1:876315805:CAF7B5230CED9CAA28F8DF36C0AC60D6:r)
Peter, our movement has the support of cops, soldiers, carpenters, welders, the young and the old, and millions of working-class families who just want a better future, a safer country, and a good job.

These are the decent Americans Hillary Clinton so viciously demonized.

These are the patriotic men and women she called "a basket of deplorables" and un-American.

**The only thing un-American is an elite politician who belittles the hard-working people of this country, holds herself above the law, and attempts to silence tens of millions of Americans who want a better and safer future for their families.**

The days of elite politicians treating the decent people of this country as their personal pawns are over.

But unless we expose Hillary Clinton for the corrupt, elitist politician that she is, millions of American voters will go on believing the media's false story that Hillary fights for the little guy.

Voters deserve to hear the truth. But I need your help delivering it to them.

[**Please contribute $100, $65, $35, $25, or even $15 to help us push our brand new ad far and wide.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37548139:WerTvIbNs:m:1:876315805:CAF7B5230CED9CAA28F8DF36C0AC60D6:r)

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

body:
We’re close to hitting our goal. Push us over the finish line, Friend. |

Did you see my brother’s email?
We’re so close to hitting our million-dollar goal to get our brand new ad on the air.
Friend - we can’t let Hillary get away with calling tens of millions of hard-working, patriotic Americans, deplorable and un-American.
Contribute any amount you can to help us fight back against Hillary’s deplorable comments with our brand new ad.
-Donald Trump, Jr.
--------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Eric Trump Date: Mon, Sep 12, 2016 at 1:38 PM Subject: Our ad is ready to go, Friend To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend, We need your help. We’re launching an ad to fight back against Hillary’s disgusting comments made at a closed-door fundraiser Friday night. She called tens of millions of hard-working Americans “deplorable” people who don’t belong in her America. We need to raise $1,OOO,OOO in the next 24 hours to help get our ad up on the air. Contribute $100, $65, $35, $25, or even $15 to help us push this far and wide.
Who exactly was Hillary talking about when she made these despicable comments? The coal miners she vows to put out of business, the veterans dying while waiting for treatment, the police officers concerned about rising crime, the American citizens worried about an uncontrolled border, the workers who haven’t seen a raise in years... And what about the former and active duty military members who strongly support my father over Hillary? Are they “deplorable”? Because we don’t subscribe to Hillary’s elitist plan for America, she’s written off tens of millions of Americans as “deplorable.” You and I both know the media will try to sweep this under the rug as quickly as they can. But that’s why we need to act fast with a fundraising blitz to get this airing in states that will determine the fate of this election. Please contribute $100, $65, $35, $25, or even $15 to help us push this ad far and wide. Thanks, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Tom Lopach, DSCC.org
subject: Welcome to the DSCC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Welcome to the DSCC, friend.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f049/2b07114c/7891ccc3/73eaadd8/1108649228/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/s/retake-senate")

Friend**\--** I want to welcome you to the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) community. We're the only committee solely dedicated to electing a Democratic Senate. From candidate recruitment to grassroots organizing to providing campaign funds in tight races, the DSCC works to elect Democratic senators who will fight for what we believe in and defeat extreme Republicans trying to hold us back.

It's my job as Executive Director to work with you to ensure that Democrats achieve victory and take back the Senate in November. That's why I'm so grateful you are joining our team. Having millions of grassroots supporters like you is the foundation of our efforts and what makes us so successful.

**[Will you pledge to stand with us in our mission to take back the Senate?](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f049/2b07114c/7891ccc3/73eaaddb/1108649228/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/retakesenate")**

**This year, we 've been reminded that who we elect to the U.S. Senate matters -- a lot.** It impacts legislation. It impacts lives. It impacts who serves on the Supreme Court. And it can even impact the future leadership of our country.

Senate Republicans are fighting hard to roll back progressive priorities and put Donald Trump in charge of the country. **It 's our job as Democrats to make sure we protect the progress we've already made and keep moving our country forward.**

Thank you for standing with us.

Sincerely,

Tom Lopach
DSCC Executive Director

P.S. Don't forget to like us on **[Facebook](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f049/2b07114c/7891ccc3/73eaadda/1108649228/VEsF/ "https://facebook.com/dscc") **and follow us on [**Twitter**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f049/2b07114c/7891ccc3/73eaadd5/1108649228/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/dscc")!

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f049/2b07114c/7891ccc3/73eaadd4/1108649228/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f049/2b07114c/7891ccc3/73eaadd7/1108649228/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f049/2b07114c/7891ccc3/73eaadd6/1108649228/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: This is our chance to stop TPP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Wall Street, big corporations, and special interests all want to pass the disastrous Trans-Pacific Partnership trade deal (TPP). They see the huge potential profits, and they're going to do everything they can to make sure it passes - and they especially hope it comes up for a vote in the lame duck session of Congress.
Working families want to defeat TPP because they know it means more of the same like other trade deals: more jobs moving overseas and more protections for corporations' reckless behavior.
**Today is our day of action to defeat TPP, and we're setting an ambitious goal: we want Our Revolution supporters to help make 50,000 calls to Congress today.**
Can you call your member of Congress and ask them to oppose TPP? [**Click here for talking points and to be connected to Congress.**](https://ourrevolution-bernie16.bsd.net/page/content/tpp-calls/ "https://ourrevolution-bernie16.bsd.net/page/content/tpp-calls/")
**[CALL CONGRESS TO STOP TPP](https://ourrevolution-bernie16.bsd.net/page/content/tpp-calls/ "https://ourrevolution-bernie16.bsd.net/page/content/tpp-calls/")**
**You can also dial this number straight from your phone and contact your member of Congress:**
[**1-844-311-2016**](tel:18443112016)
We're targeting calls to the House of Representatives because that is our best chance at winning the fight against TPP. If TPP passes Congress, that's it. It can't be changed. TPP can't be cancelled unless all 12 nations pull out. We must defeat it before it's too late.
Our Revolution is helping lead a huge coalition of labor and environmental groups with millions of members who are committed to defeating TPP. We're excited to have you as part of this effort.
[**Click here to be connected to Congress and to read talking points about TPP**](https://ourrevolution-bernie16.bsd.net/page/content/tpp-calls/ "https://ourrevolution-bernie16.bsd.net/page/content/tpp-calls/"); you can also call [**1-844-311-2016**](tel:18443112016) on your phone.
Thank you.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair, Our Revolution
Former President, Communication Workers of America

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stop-the_tpp?refcode=em160914-tpp "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stop-the_tpp?refcode=em160914-tpp")**

name: Marc C., HillaryClinton.com
subject: Why I knock doors --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
| Hi there, Derek! My name is Marc and I’m a volunteer for Hillary for America. As we get down to the wire in this campaign (only eight weeks to go!), it’s so important for absolutely everyone to get involved -- and I learned firsthand how easy it is to make a difference in this election with just a few hours of your time. So today I want to tell you about my new favorite activity: canvassing.

What does canvassing mean? It's just knocking on doors and talking to voters. Whether you’re canvassing your own neighborhood or traveling to another state, the people you talk to are grateful and impressed that you took the time to talk with them about why this election matters to you -- and to give them useful information like where to vote and how to register.

Interested? **[Add your name now and we’ll be in touch to help you get started.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjY1MDYyNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMjEyNDQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I had never canvassed before this election, but all that changed when I drove from Kansas to Iowa with a group of friends. The people at the local campaign office were so helpful: They had well-organized canvassing packets prepared for us that included a script, a map, and a list of targeted households where the voters we were trying to reach lived.

Soon after we started, I realized the whole thing was a piece of cake! A conversation starts with one word: "Hello.” And that's what this work is all about -- just having a conversation. When I'm out knocking doors, I know all I need to do is speak from the heart about why I think Hillary is the only choice for president.

**Will you join me? Sign up here! The organizers at your local field office will be so excited to meet you:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjY1MDYyNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMjEyNDQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
I recommend that everyone get out there and canvass. You don’t need experience, you don’t need to be an expert. You just have to be passionate and excited to help Hillary become our next president. I know you’ll be great -- and Hillary needs you out there!

Thank you,

Marc C.
Volunteer
Hillary for America

clean_body: | Hi there, Derek! My name is Marc and I’m a volunteer for Hillary for America. As we get down to the wire in this campaign (only eight weeks to go!), it’s so important for absolutely everyone to get involved -- and I learned firsthand how easy it is to make a difference in this election with just a few hours of your time. So today I want to tell you about my new favorite activity: canvassing. What does canvassing mean? It's just knocking on doors and talking to voters. Whether you’re canvassing your own neighborhood or traveling to another state, the people you talk to are grateful and impressed that you took the time to talk with them about why this election matters to you -- and to give them useful information like where to vote and how to register. Interested? I had never canvassed before this election, but all that changed when I drove from Kansas to Iowa with a group of friends. The people at the local campaign office were so helpful: They had well-organized canvassing packets prepared for us that included a script, a map, and a list of targeted households where the voters we were trying to reach lived. Soon after we started, I realized the whole thing was a piece of cake! A conversation starts with one word: "Hello.” And that's what this work is all about -- just having a conversation. When I'm out knocking doors, I know all I need to do is speak from the heart about why I think Hillary is the only choice for president. Will you join me? Sign up here! The organizers at your local field office will be so excited to meet you: I recommend that everyone get out there and canvass. You don’t need experience, you don’t need to be an expert. You just have to be passionate and excited to help Hillary become our next president. I know you’ll be great -- and Hillary needs you out there! Thank you, Marc C. body:
Environmental progress is at risk.

Dear Friend,

I'm writing to ask you for a contribution -- but not for my campaign.

Today, I'm asking you to join me, local and national conservation organizations like the League of Conservation Voters, and thousands of environmental activists across Washington and the United States in a major fundraising effort -- 'GreenStorm' -- supporting Hillary Clinton and three top-tier Senate candidates committed to fighting for the environment.

Here's why I'm asking you to support this national fundraising blitz right away!

LINK: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTUxNzE5NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTAwMTE4NzQyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0

As governor, I've made it a priority to protect our environment. Together, we've worked hard to fight climate change, boost clean energy, and commit to building a sustainable future for our children and grandchildren.

But the progress we have made is at risk. If Republican Donald Trump wins the White House, and Republicans maintain their grip on Congress, years of environmental headway at the state and federal levels could be wiped out.

Climate change deniers and aggressive opponents of environmental protection would be in charge of the legacy we want to leave to our children and grandchildren. Big Polluters would influence decision-making on the future of our air, land, and water for years to come.

We can't let that happen. That's why I'm asking you to donate directly to the 'GreenStorm' right now. The goal is $500,000 by the end of today. We can get there if everyone pitches in.

LINK: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTUxNzE5NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTAwMTE4NzQyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0

Big Polluters are funneling millions of dollars into the presidential race and critical Senate contests. They're going after environmental champions like Hillary Clinton, Ted Strickland in Ohio (a longtime friend of mine!), Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada, Deborah Ross in North Carolina, and Katie McGinty in Pennsylvania.

By supporting 'GreenStorm' we can help elect Hillary Clinton, and win back our environmental firewall in the Senate.

Your contribution will have an impact -- and it will help determine the environmental future for our children and grandchildren in Washington and across America.

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

CONTRIBUTE: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTUxNzE5NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTAwMTE4NzQyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0

Contributions are not tax deductible.

body:
I'm not willing to take a chance | Derek --

According to a _Bloomberg News_ poll just released, if this election were held today, we’d lose Ohio to Donald Trump by 5 points.

And if you're about to quote one of our campaign's emails back to me and say "don't ever look at one poll in isolation," I'll tell you to look at the RealClearPolitics _average of polls_ for Ohio, which now has us basically tied.

One state isn't an election (even if that state is Ohio), but this is exactly the kind of trend that proves we need to get more folks on the ground _stat._

And that kind of flexibility takes resources, which is exactly why we set our goal of 2.5 million donors by the end of the month in the first place -- these grassroots donations give us the investment that we count on to help us win this thing where it counts.

We’ve got to leave it all on the field here, Derek. Hesitation could lose us this race -- and I’m not willing to take that chance. I hope you’re not, either. **We need another 8 donations from your area before the end of today to stay on track to hit our goal. Will you chip in $1 right now? We’ll send a free sticker to say thanks.** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY1MTA5MDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMjQ3MTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Marlon

Hillary for America
